LightningMessageChannel.description: Broadcasts the full active filter criteria (date range + dimension lists) from the FluentMetric AI filter rail to every dashboard that slices data.

lightningMessageFields.description: JSON-encoded FilterCriteria payload: startDate, endDate, userIds, promptTemplateDevNames, models, providers, features, appTypes.
Start of the selected date range (ISO-8601 string). Duplicated at top level so simple date-only subscribers don't have to parse criteriaJson.
End of the selected date range (ISO-8601 string).
Human-readable label for the date preset (e.g. "Last 30 days", "Custom").
Optional Explorer group-by hint set by "Open in Explorer" hand-offs (e.g. "User", "PromptTemplate", "Day"). Subscribers that aren't the Explorer can ignore it.
